```yaml
---
agent: momo              # 负责人：momo / media / hunter / shared
category: architecture   # 分类：

                         #   - draft (草稿)
                         #   - stable (稳定)
                         #   - deprecated (废弃)
date: 2026-03-16        # 创建日期
last_modified: 2026-03-16  # 最后修改
version: 1.0.0          # 版本号
tags:                   # 标签
  - gene
  - sync
  - memory
---
```
